tldr: Athena — your account fatigue score is 27/100 with a healthy refresh cadence and 34 distinct concepts running, which is well above the Andromeda diversity floor. The bigger story isn't fatigue, it's that most of those 34 concepts are buried under heavy duplication of the same BOGO and 'Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off' ad — so the unique angles aren't getting the oxygen they deserve.

benchmark.context: At your spend bracket (whale tier), hero creatives should be refreshed inside 10 days and definitely before 14. Concept-count-wise you're already in excellent territory at 34 distinct angles — Andromeda's clustering only starts hurting brands below 8 concepts, so the lever here is consolidation and rotation, not adding more.

ads.headline: Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones
ads.body: Save Up to 45% Off Our New Arrivals Get 20% Off Your First Order + Free Gift Over 5,000 Five Star Reviews
drivers: Running 20 days — twice the 10-day stale-hero threshold for a brand at your spend bracket
The body copy ('Save Up to 45% Off… 20% Off First Order + Free Gift… 5,000 Five Star Reviews') is recycled verbatim across roughly a half-dozen of your new-arrivals carousels
Single-product framing on a video — no transformation, no founder voice, no UGC; visual is doing all the work and the algorithm has clustered it with your other discount-led variants

ads.headline: Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off

This exact body copy ('Luxury You Deserve — Handcrafted in Bali…') appears verbatim on more than 40 of your live ads — Andromeda treats this as one cluster, not 40 ads
Same headline + same body + same landing page (/collections/sarda-favorites) repeated across image, video, and carousel placements with no creative differentiation

hero_concept.hook: Janyl cuts the chrysocolla. Her mother polished the silver.
hero_concept.headline: Built To Outlast Trends
hero_concept.primary_text:
Sarda is on its third generation of Balinese silversmiths. Same workshop. Same hands-and-hammer process. No plating shortcuts.

The Ocean's of Grace bundle is set in genuine chrysocolla and .925 sterling silver — the kind of piece that gets passed down, not replaced next season.

First-order BOGO with code STACK. Free welcome kit and free shipping included.
hero_concept.visual_direction: Hero shot of the Ocean's of Grace chrysocolla bundle resting on weathered linen with artisan tools (silversmith hammer, polishing cloth) softly out of focus in the background — quiet, editorial, lets the sterling and the blue-green stone breathe.
hero_concept.fills_gap: Right now your account is leaning hard on discount-led copy ('Up to 45% Off', 'BOGO') across most actives, with the heritage angle ('three generations', 'master silversmiths with over 30 years of expertise') buried inside the same blocks. This concept pulls the heritage story up to the front and uses the BOGO as the close, giving Andromeda a meaningfully different cluster to surface against your existing discount-led ones.
hero_concept.image_prompt: A photorealistic editorial product photograph featuring the product from the reference image, styled in a quiet artisan workshop scene with the bundle resting on weathered natural linen alongside softly out-of-focus silversmithing tools (a small polishing cloth, a worn wooden bench corner), with directional natural window light from the upper left casting a soft cool highlight across the silver and a gentle shadow to the lower right. Editorial, museum-quality, restrained luxury aesthetic with cool neutral tones — no warm golden cast. Square 1:1 composition with breathing room top and bottom for ad text overlay. CRITICAL — preserve the exact .925 sterling silver finish and the exact blue-green chrysocolla stone color (mottled turquoise-and-teal with natural matrix veining) as shown in the reference image — strictly NO gold, brass, yellow, copper, rose-gold, or warm metallic tones on the metal, and strictly NO color shift on the chrysocolla to solid blue, solid green, lapis, or turquoise — preserve the natural mottled chrysocolla pattern exactly. STRUCTURE — preserve the exact construction of the bundle: same number of pieces, same number of chrysocolla stones, same stone shapes and sizes, same bezel/setting style, same chain link pattern, same clasp type, and the same arrangement as shown in the reference. Do NOT add or remove stones, do NOT add or remove pieces from the bundle, do NOT change the setting style, do NOT swap the chain pattern, do NOT alter clasp hardware, do NOT introduce additional charms or pendants. Render the product's metal, color, finish, stones, surface treatment, AND every visible construction detail (silhouette, closures, hardware count) EXACTLY as they appear in the reference image. Do NOT change the metal type, do NOT shift the color temperature, do NOT introduce tones not present in the reference, do NOT add or remove buttons, snaps, zippers, pockets, straps, or any hardware, do NOT alter the silhouette, do NOT remove or modify printed graphics or text on the garment. IMPORTANT: the 'no text' and 'no logos' items in the NEGATIVE list below apply ONLY to text or logos added as overlay to the photograph itself — text, logos, graphics, prints, and brand labels that exist ON the product in the reference image are part of the product and must be preserved exactly. Premium commerce photography quality. NEGATIVE: no overlay text added to the photograph, no overlay logos added to the photograph, no watermarks, no UI elements, no Facebook interface, no clickable buttons, no faces, no models, no collage, no borders, no duplicate products, no color shift, no metal swap, no silver-to-gold or gold-to-silver conversion, no warm-tone bias on cool metals, no recoloring of fabric or stones, no pattern modifications, no removing or replacing the product's printed graphics, no extra hardware not present in reference, no added pockets or pleats, no silhouette alterations, no design modifications.
hero_concept.reference_title: Ocean's of Grace In Chrysocolla Bundle

next_step.urgency: Most of your hero set crosses the warn line within 3 days.
next_step.headline: Want us to map the full rotation plan?
next_step.body: Your concept count is genuinely strong — the issue is delivery overlap from duplicated body copy across 40+ ads. Book 30 minutes and we'll walk you through the consolidation map and the next 4 hero concepts in your voice.

method_note: Patterns drawn from your 185 currently-running Meta ads via the public Ad Library; no private metrics were used or implied.
